threshold_method: quantile(val-benign p(anom), 1-0.02, 'higher') over the stratified sandbox validation split (never fit on)
architecture: grid_struct: MARS conv stack over nv_grid_v2 + 30-dim structural aux branch (build_mars_v2)
training: seeded sandbox (seed 4242): 82 benign + 36 benign-faults-as-benign + 859 synthetic anomalies over non-holdout bases; spec-plausible mimics excluded from the anomalous label
